name: createBalanceManager
description: Use createBalanceManagerWithOwner to create a new balance manager with a custom owner. Returns the manager object. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

address.description: The address of the owner of the balance manager which is the address for the AI agent.

name: depositIntoManager
description: Use depositIntoManager to deposit funds into a balance manager. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

managerKey.description: Deposits a specified amount of funds or tokens into the protocol's manager account or treasury.

coinKey.description: The coin key of the token to deposit.

amount.description: The amount of tokens to deposit.

name: withdrawFund
description: Use withdrawFund to withdraw funds from a balance manager. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

managerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager.

coinKey.description: String that identifies the coin to withdraw.

amount.description: Number representing the amount to withdraw.

name: withdrawAllDeep
description: Use withdrawAllDeep to withdraw all funds of a specific coin type from a balance manager. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

managerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager.

coinKey.description: String that identifies the coin to withdraw.

name: mintAndUseTradeCap
description: creating capability from delegate trading on deepbook

managerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager.

traderAddress.description: String that identifies the trader's address.

name: mintDepositCap
description: Use mintDepositCap to deposit funds into a balance manager using a depositCap. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

managerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager.

recipient.description: String that identifies the recipient's address.

name: account
description: Use account to retrieve the account information for a BalanceManager in a pool, which has the following form: parameters - @poolKey: String that identifies the pool to query.@balanceManagerKey: key of the balance manager defined in the SDK.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

balanceManagerKey.description: key of the balance manager defined in the SDK.

name: accountOpenOrders
description: Use accountOpenOrders to retrieve open orders for the balance manager and pool with the IDs you provide. The call returns a Promise that contains an array of open order IDs. parameters - poolKey: String that identifies the pool to query.managerKey: String that identifies the balance manager to query.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

managerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager to query.

name: checkManagerBalance
description: Use checkManagerBalance to check the balance manager for a specific coin. The call returns a Promise in the form

managerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager to query.

coinType.description: String that identifies the coin to query the balance of

name: getOrder
description: Use getOrder to retrieve an order's information.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

orderId.description: orderId: ID of the order to query.

name: getQuantityOut
description: getQuantityOut to retrieve the output quantities for the base or quote quantity you provide.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

baseQuantity.description: Number that defines the base quantity you want to convert. Set to 0 if using quote quantity.

quoteQuantity.description: Number that defines the quote quantity you want to convert. Set to 0 if using base quantity.

name: getLevel2Range
description: Use getLevel2Range to retrieve level 2 order book within the boundary price range you provide.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

priceLow.description: Number for lower bound of price range.

priceHigh.description: Number for upper bound of price range.

isBid.description: Boolean when set to true gets bid orders, else retrieve ask orders.

name: getLevel2TicksFromMid
description: Use getLevel2TicksFromMid to retrieve level 2 order book ticks from mid-price for a pool with the ID you provide.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

name: lockedBalance
description: Use lockedBalance to retrieve a BalanceManager locked balance in the pool.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

balanceManagerKey.description: key of the balance manager defined in the SDK.

name: poolTradeParams
description: Use poolTradeParams to retrieve the trade params for the pool, which has the following form { takerFee: , makerFee: , stakeRequired: }

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

name: vaultBalances
description: Use vaultBalances to get the vault balances for a pool with the ID you provide.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

name: getPoolIdByAssets
description: Use getPoolIdByAssets to retrieve the pool ID for the asset types you provide.

baseType.description: String of the type of base asset.

quoteType.description: String of the type of quote asset.

name: midPrice
description: Use midPrice to retrieve the mid price for a pool with the ID that you provide.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

name: whitelisted
description: Use whitelisted to check if the pool with the ID you provide is whitelisted. The call returns a Promise as a boolean indicating whether the pool is whitelisted.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

name: poolBookParams
description: Use poolBookParams to retrieve the book parameters for a pool, including tick size, lot size, and min size. The call returns a Promise with the book parameters.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

name: getOrders
description: Use getOrders to retrieve multiple orders from a pool. The call returns a Promise with an array of order information.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

orderIds.description: Array of strings representing the order IDs to retrieve.

name: getPoolDeepPrice
description: Use getPoolDeepPrice to get the DEEP price conversion for a pool. The call returns a Promise with the DEEP price information.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to query.

name: addDeepPricePoint
description: Use addDeepPricePoint to add a DEEP price point for a target pool using a reference pool. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

targetPoolKey.description: String that identifies the target pool to add the DEEP price point to.

referencePoolKey.description: String that identifies the reference pool to use for the DEEP price point.

name: updatePoolAllowedVersions
description: Use updatePoolAllowedVersions to update the allowed package versions for a pool. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool to update.

name: createPermissionlessPool
description: Use createPermissionlessPool to create a new permissionless pool. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

baseCoinKey.description: String that identifies the base coin.

quoteCoinKey.description: String that identifies the quote coin.

minSize.description: Number representing the minimum order size.

deepCoin.description: Optional TransactionArgument for DEEP token payment.

name: getBalanceManagerIds
description: Use getBalanceManagerIds to get all balance manager IDs for a specific owner.

name: mintReferral
description: Use mintReferral to create a new referral for a pool with a specified multiplier. The multiplier determines what percentage of trading fees are allocated to the referrer. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool.

multiplier.description: Number representing the referral multiplier (such as 0.1 for 10%).

name: updateReferralMultiplier
description: Use updateReferralMultiplier to update the multiplier for an existing referral. Only the referral owner can update the multiplier. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool.

multiplier.description: Number representing the referral multiplier (such as 0.1 for 10%).

name: claimReferralRewards
description: Use claimReferralRewards to claim accumulated referral fees. Returns an object with baseRewards, quoteRewards, and deepRewards. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool.

name: getReferralBalances
description: Use getReferralBalances to retrieve the referral balances for a given pool and referral. Returns an object with baseRewards, quoteRewards, and deepRewards.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool.

name: placeLimitOrder
description: Use placeLimitOrder to place limit orders. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool.

balanceManagerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager.

clientOrderId.description: String that identifies the client order.

price.description: Number representing the price of the order.

quantity.description: Number representing the quantity of the order.

isBid.description: Boolean indicating whether the order is a bid or ask.

expiration.description: Number representing the expiration time of the order.

payWithDeep.description: Boolean indicating whether to pay with Deep.

name: placeMarketOrder
description: Use placeMarketOrder to place market orders. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String representing the pool key for the market order.

balanceManagerKey.description: String representing the balance manager key for the market order.

clientOrderId.description: String representing the client order ID for the market order.

quantity.description: String representing the quantity for the market order.

isBid.description: Boolean indicating whether the order is a bid or ask.

payWithDeep.description: Boolean indicating whether to pay with Deep.

name: cancelOrder
description: Use cancelOrder to cancel an existing order that is identified by the orderId that you provide. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: Boolean indicating whether the order is a bid or ask.

balanceManagerKey.description: String representing the order ID to cancel.

orderId.description: String representing the order ID to cancel.

name: cancelOrders
description: Use cancelOrders to cancel multiple orders atomically by providing an array of order IDs. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String representing the pool key.

balanceManagerKey.description: String representing the balance manager key.

orderIds.description: Array of strings representing the order IDs to cancel.

name: cancelAllOrders
description: Use cancelAllOrders to cancel every order for the balance manager whose key you provide. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String representing the pool key.

balanceManagerKey.description: String representing the balance manager key.

name: modifyOrder
description: Use modifyOrder to modify an existing order by changing its quantity. The new quantity must be less than the original quantity and more than the filled quantity. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String representing the pool key.

balanceManagerKey.description: String representing the balance manager key.

orderId.description: String representing the order ID to modify.

newQuantity.description: String representing the new price for the order.

name: withdrawSettledAmounts
description: Use withdrawSettledAmounts to withdraw all settled amounts for a balance manager in a specific pool. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String representing the pool key.

balanceManagerKey.description: String representing the balance manager key.

name: withdrawSettledAmountsPermissionless
description: Use withdrawSettledAmountsPermissionless to withdraw settled amounts permissionlessly for any balance manager. This can be called by anyone and does not require a trade proof. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String representing the pool key.

balanceManagerKey.description: String representing the balance manager key.

name: borrowBaseAsset
description: Use borrowBaseAsset to borrow a base asset from the pool identified by the poolKey value you provide. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object

poolKey.description: String representing the pool key.

borrowAmount.description: Number that represents the amount to borrow from the pool.

name: returnBaseAsset
description: Use returnBaseAsset to return the base asset to the pool identified by the poolKey value you provide. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String representing the pool key.

borrowAmount.description: Number that represents the amount to borrow from the pool.

baseCoinInput.description: Coin object representing the base asset to be returned.

flashLoan.description: Flash loan object representing the loan to be settled.

name: borrowQuoteAsset
description: Use borrowQuoteAsset to borrow a quote asset from the pool identified by the poolKey value you provide. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String representing the pool key.

borrowAmount.description: Number that represents the amount to borrow from the pool.

name: returnQuoteAsset
description: Use returnQuoteAsset to return a quote asset to the pool identified by the poolKey you provide. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String representing the pool key.

borrowAmount.description: Number that represents the amount to borrow from the pool.

quoteCoinInput.description: Coin object representing the quote asset to be returned.

flashLoan.description: Number that represents the amount to return to the pool.

name: swapExactBaseForQuote
description: Use swapExactBaseForQuote to swap exact base amount for quote amount. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String representing the pool key.

amount.description: Number that represents the amount to swap from the base asset to the quote asset.

deepAmount.description: Number that represents the amount to swap from the base asset to the quote asset.

minOut.description: Number that represents the minimum amount of quote asset to receive.

deepCoin.description: The DEEP coin object used to pay for trading fees or provide utility, formatted as a TransactionObjectArgument.

baseCoin.description: The base asset of the trading pair (the coin being bought or sold), formatted as a TransactionObjectArgument.

quoteCoin.description: The quote asset of the trading pair (the coin used to price the base asset), formatted as a TransactionObjectArgument.

name: swapExactQuoteForBase
description: Use swapExactQuoteForBase to swap exact quote amount for base amount. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

amount.description: Number that represents the amount to swap from the base asset to the quote asset.

deepAmount.description: Number that represents the amount to swap from the base asset to the quote asset.

minOut.description: Number that represents the minimum amount of quote asset to receive.

deepCoin.description: The DEEP coin object used to pay for trading fees or provide utility, formatted as a TransactionObjectArgument.

baseCoin.description: The base asset of the trading pair (the coin being bought or sold), formatted as a TransactionObjectArgument.

quoteCoin.description: The quote asset of the trading pair (the coin used to price the base asset), formatted as a TransactionObjectArgument.

name: swapExactQuantity
description: Use swapExactQuantity to swap an exact quantity in either direction (base to quote or quote to base) without using a balance manager. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool.

amount.description: Number that represents the amount to swap from the base asset to the quote asset.

deepAmount.description: Number that represents the amount of DEEP coin to use for trading fees or utility.

minOut.description: Number that represents the minimum amount of quote asset to receive.

isBaseToCoin.description: Boolean indicating swap direction (true = base to quote).

baseCoin.description: Optional TransactionArgument for base coin input.

quoteCoin.description: Optional TransactionArgument for quote coin input.

deepCoin.description: Optional TransactionArgument for DEEP coin input.

name: swapExactQuantityWithManager
description: Use swapExactQuantityWithManager to swap an exact quantity using a balance manager. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String that represents the pool key for the liquidity pool to use for the swap.

balanceManagerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager.

amount.description: Number representing the amount to swap.

minOut.description: Number representing the minimum amount of quote coin to receive.

isBaseToCoin.description: Boolean indicating whether the swap is base to coin or coin to base.

baseCoin.description: Optional TransactionArgument for base coin input.

quoteCoin.description: Optional TransactionArgument for quote coin input.

name: stake
description: Use stake to stake an amount you specify into a specific pool. The call returns a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: Number representing the amount to stake.

balanceManagerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager.

stakeAmount.description: Number representing the amount to stake.

name: unstake
description: Use unstake to unstake from a particular pool. The call returns a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool.

balanceManagerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager.

name: submitProposal
description: Use submitProposal to submit a governance proposal for a specific liquidity pool. The call returns a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String representing the unique identifier of the target DeepBook liquidity pool for this proposal.

balanceManagerKey.description: String representing the unique identifier of the Balance Manager submitting the proposal.

takerFee.description: Number representing the proposed fee charged to takers (orders that remove liquidity), typically expressed in basis points or a specific multiplier.

makerFee.description: Number representing the proposed fee charged to makers (orders that add liquidity), typically expressed in basis points or a specific multiplier.

stakeRequired.description: Number representing the proposed minimum DEEP token stake required to participate or gain maker privileges in the pool.

name: vote
description: Use vote to vote on a proposal. The call returns a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool.

balanceManagerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager.

proposal_id.description: String that identifies the proposal to vote on.

name: claimRebates
description: Use claimRebates to claim maker/taker rebates for a balance manager in a specific pool. The call returns a function that takes a Transaction object.

poolKey.description: String that identifies the pool.

balanceManagerKey.description: String that identifies the balance manager.
